description_for_human: Browse the pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples registry of declarative agent samples.
description_for_model:
Plugin for discovering and reading declarative agent samples in the public `pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples` GitHub repository. ALL calls are unauthenticated - there is no `search/code` function in this plugin (GitHub's code-search endpoint requires auth and has been intentionally removed). Discovery is driven by a structured registry, not by code search.

ROUTING RULES - pick exactly one tool first, then optionally drill into a single sample:

1. FOR ANY 'find me a sample / which samples / show me samples that…' QUESTION → ALWAYS call `getSamplesRegistry` FIRST. It returns the full sample registry (~100 KB JSON array) in one anonymous call. After receiving the response, base64-decode the `content` field, parse as JSON, then filter the array client-side by: (a) folder-name prefix on the `Folder` property (`da-*` = declarative agents, `mcs-*` = Microsoft Copilot Studio, `cea-*` = custom engine agents), (b) `metadata` entries - look for `{ "key": "PLATFORM", "value": "M365" }`, `{ "key": "LANGUAGE", "value": "<lang>" }`, `{ "key": "API-PLUGIN", "value": "YES" }`, `{ "key": "GRAPH-CONNECTOR", "value": "YES" }`, etc., or (c) scenario keywords inside `title`, `shortDescription`, and `longDescription`. Cite the `Folder` value in your reply and link to `https://github.com/pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples/tree/main/samples/{Folder}`.

2. FOR DEEP-DIVES into a specific sample (read its README, its declarativeAgent.json, its ai-plugin.json) → call `getRepoContent` with owner=`pnp`, repo=`copilot-pro-dev-samples`, path=`samples/{Folder}/README.md` (or the specific file). Decode the base64 `content` field for text. Only call this AFTER the registry has identified the relevant Folder.

3. AS A FALLBACK ONLY (when the registry seems stale or a brand-new sample isn't listed yet) → call `listSamples` to get the raw directory listing of `samples/`.

4. FOR REPO-LEVEL OVERVIEW (description, star count, topics, top-level README) → call `getRepo` or `getRepoReadme`.

5. FOR DISCOVERING OTHER PNP REPOS (NOT samples inside this repo) → call `searchRepositories` with a query like `topic:m365-copilot user:pnp`. Anonymous limit: ~10 requests/minute.

RATE LIMITS: All calls are unauthenticated → ~60 req/hour per client IP overall; Search API additionally caps at ~10 req/minute. On HTTP 403 with a rate-limit message, tell the user to wait an hour or browse the repo directly at https://github.com/pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples.

functions.name: getSamplesRegistry
functions.description: PRIMARY discovery tool - always call this first for any 'find a sample / which samples / show me samples that…' question. Returns the contents of `.github/samples.json` (the hand-maintained registry of every sample in pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples). Response is a standard contents object with a base64-encoded `content` field; decode and parse as JSON to get the full array of sample entries (each has `name`, `title`, `shortDescription`, `longDescription`, `Folder`, `metadata`, `thumbnails`, `authors`).

body.text: Loaded the full sample registry from `.github/samples.json` - every declarative agent sample in pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples is now available for filtering.

functions.name: listSamples
functions.description: FALLBACK only - call this when the `getSamplesRegistry` result seems stale or a brand-new sample isn't listed. Returns the raw directory listing for `samples/` in pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples. Each entry's `name` is the sample folder (e.g., `da-ristorante-api-csharp`).

functions.name: searchRepositories
functions.description: Search public GitHub repositories. Use ONLY for cross-repo discovery (e.g., `q=topic:m365-copilot user:pnp`), NOT for in-repo sample discovery. Anonymous limit: ~10 requests/minute.

functions.name: getRepo
functions.description: Get metadata for a single public GitHub repository (description, stars, default branch, topics). Typical use: owner=`pnp`, repo=`copilot-pro-dev-samples`.

functions.name: getRepoContent
functions.description: Read a file or directory inside a public GitHub repo. ONLY call this AFTER `getSamplesRegistry` has identified the specific sample Folder - pass owner=`pnp`, repo=`copilot-pro-dev-samples`, path=`samples/{Folder}/README.md` (or the specific declarativeAgent.json / ai-plugin.json). For files, decode the base64 `content` field for text. For directories, the response is an array of entries.

functions.name: getRepoReadme
functions.description: Read the top-level README of a public GitHub repo (repo-level overview, NOT a per-sample README - for the latter, call `getRepoContent`). Returns a base64-encoded `content` field; decode for the markdown.

conversation_starters.text: Find me a sample that uses Code Interpreter
Which samples include an API plugin?
I want to build an agent for HR - which samples are closest?
How do I clone and run the da-ristorante-api-csharp sample?
What does declarativeAgent.json need at minimum?
I have an OpenAPI spec for my internal API - how do I wire it into a sample?
